sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57427" key="kinaqismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῐνᾰθ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl>; also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κίναθος</orth>, <sense id="n57427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θησαυρισμός</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
